name: Sim City Golf LLC
address: 213 N Stephanie St # F, Henderson, NV 89074
about: Sim City Golf Club is a 24/7 private indoor golf facility located in Henderson, NV, with two locations at 213 N Stephanie St. Ste F and 2550 Anthem Village Drive. The venue utilizes Trackman's state-of-the-art technology to provide a realistic golf simulation experience, allowing players to beat the heat and work on their swing. Membership options start at $195 per month and include unlimited bay reservations, with an online booking system for convenient reservations. The facility is designed for serious golfers looking to practice in a private environment, offering affordable alternatives to traditional golf courses.
why_golfers_like_it: Powered by Trackman's state-of-the-art technology for precise swing tracking
Convenient online booking system available from anywhere
Affordable membership options compared to traditional golf courses
